query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND (
    (TABLE_NAME = 'tasks' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('buildTargetId','buildBranchId'))
    OR (TABLE_NAME = 'task_global_file_links' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'source')
    OR (TABLE_NAME = 'orchestration_turns' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('state','approvalStatus','approvalPlanContent','approvalDecisionMessage','approvalRequestedAt','approvalResolvedAt'))
    OR (TABLE_NAME = 'user_preferences' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('id','ownerUserId','alwaysRequireKimiApproval','createdAt','updatedAt'))
    OR (TABLE_NAME = 'build_targets' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('governanceFilesJson','governanceBudgetEnforced'))
  )
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;
SELECT id, ownerUserId, name, repoUrl, githubTokenEnvVar, defaultBaseBranch, protectedBranchesJson, validationCommandsJson, serviceChecksJson, agentEnvVarMapJson, governanceFilesJson, governanceBudgetEnforced, status, createdAt, updatedAt
FROM build_targets
WHERE ownerUserId = 1 AND status = 'active'
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
SELECT id, ownerUserId, title, summary, status, routeMode, buildTargetId, buildBranchId, createdAt, updatedAt, lastActivityAt, archivedAt
FROM tasks
WHERE ownerUserId = 1 AND (status = 'active' OR status = 'waiting' OR status = 'blocked' OR status = 'completed' OR status = 'error')
ORDER BY lastActivityAt DESC
LIMIT 50;

    OR (TABLE_NAME = 'user_preferences' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('id','ownerUserId','alwaysRequireKimiApproval','createdAt','updatedAt'))
    OR (TABLE_NAME = 'build_targets' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('governanceFilesJson','governanceBudgetEnforced'))
  )
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;
SELECT id, ownerUserId, name, repoUrl, githubTokenEnvVar, defaultBaseBranch, protectedBranchesJson, validationCommandsJson, serviceChecksJson, agentEnvVarMapJson, governanceFilesJson, governanceBudgetEnforced, status, createdAt, updatedAt
FROM build_targets
WHERE ownerUserId = 1 AND status = 'active'
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
SELECT id, ownerUserId, title, summary, status, routeMode, buildTargetId, buildBranchId, createdAt, updatedAt, lastActivityAt, archivedAt
FROM tasks
WHERE ownerUserId = 1 AND (status = 'active' OR status = 'waiting' OR status = 'blocked' OR status = 'completed' OR status = 'error')
ORDER BY lastActivityAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
